channel.title: topological sort on changcui
channel.description: Recent content in topological sort on changcui

item.title: 207. Course Schedule
item.description: // 思路一：拓扑排序 class Solution { public: bool canFinish(int numCourses, vector<vector<int>>& prerequisites) { vector<int> incoming(numCourses, 0); vector<vector<int>> edges(numCourses, vector<int>{}); int node = numCourses; for (auto p : prerequisites) { incoming[p[0]]++; edges[p[1]].push_back(p[0]); } queue<int> q; for (int i = 0; i < numCourses; i++) { if (incoming[i] == 0) q.push(i); } while (!q.empty()) { auto c = q.front(); q.pop(); node--; for (int i = 0; i < edges[c].size(); i++) { incoming[edges[c][i]]--; if (incoming[edges[c][i]] == 0) q.
